response.global_analysis: Verification: 1. Audio phonetically matches the JSON reference for the song 'Adabana Necromancy'. 2. The reference JSON provided only contains the first verse/chorus, so I have supplemented the remaining lyrics (Verse 2, Bridge, etc.) based on the audio and on-screen text. 3. The video begins with the final line of the previous song ('Nippon Egao Hyakkei'), which I have subtitled. 4. Timestamps are strictly aligned with the audio waveforms, ensuring no early cutoffs or overlap with subsequent lines.

subtitles.original: 笑う門には福来たる！
subtitles.english: Fortune comes to those who laugh!

subtitles.original: 誰が弔う
subtitles.english: Who mourns?

subtitles.original: 死地は彼方
subtitles.english: The land of death is afar

subtitles.original: 静寂を破り
subtitles.english: Breaking the silence,

subtitles.original: 芽吹いた夢を
subtitles.english: the dreams that budded.

subtitles.original: 誓え
subtitles.english: Swear it,

subtitles.original: 穿て
subtitles.english: pierce through it.

subtitles.original: 重なる 屍
subtitles.english: Upon the piled-up corpses,

subtitles.original: 高みへ
subtitles.english: to the heights...

subtitles.original: 届くまで
subtitles.english: Until it reaches.

subtitles.original: 唸れ徒花 朽ち果てても進め
subtitles.english: Roar, fruitless flowers; move forward even if you rot.

subtitles.original: 奪わせはしない 尊厳の愚弄に
subtitles.english: I won't let them take it, the mockery of dignity.

subtitles.original: 飢餓を解き放て
subtitles.english: Unleash the starvation.

subtitles.original: 枯れても走ることを命と呼べ
subtitles.english: Call the act of running even when withered 'life'.

subtitles.original: 空に叫ぶ 脱・生存の定義
subtitles.english: Shout to the sky, the definition of escape and survival.

subtitles.original: 骨を斬らせて 闇を断て
subtitles.english: Let your bones be cut, and sever the darkness.

subtitles.original: 傷ひとつ無い 手など愚か
subtitles.english: Hands without a single scratch are foolish.

subtitles.original: 意思も自由も その身を投げて
subtitles.english: Throwing away will and freedom, toss your body.

subtitles.original: 守れ
subtitles.english: Protect it.

subtitles.original: 退くな
subtitles.english: Don't back down.

subtitles.original: 涙も 血も無い 神話を
subtitles.english: A myth without tears or blood,

subtitles.original: 築くまで
subtitles.english: until we build it.

subtitles.original: 燃えろ修羅花 鼓動なき世界で
subtitles.english: Burn, asura flowers, in a world without a heartbeat.

subtitles.original: 摂理に抗い 天命を奮え
subtitles.english: Resist providence, exert your destiny.

subtitles.original: 腐り切り抜けて
subtitles.english: Cut through the rot.

subtitles.original: 心を無くすことが死と知れ
subtitles.english: Know that losing your heart is death.

subtitles.original: 極めど儚い 偶像の寵児
subtitles.english: Frail and fleeting darlings of the idols,

subtitles.original: 目には目を剥き 牙を剥け
subtitles.english: expose your eyes and bare your fangs.

subtitles.original: いつか誰もが 散華なる捨て石
subtitles.english: Someday everyone will be a sacrificial scattering flower.

subtitles.original: 輝け 刹那無限の火花
subtitles.english: Shine, the spark of an infinite moment,

subtitles.original: 乱世に迸る
subtitles.english: gushing out in the turbulent world.

subtitles.original: SAGA SAGA
subtitles.english: SAGA, SAGA!

subtitles.original: 何が神の如くか 裁きなどさせない
subtitles.english: What is like a god? I won't let anyone judge us.

subtitles.original: 希望 高らかに 打ち鳴らせ
subtitles.english: Ring out hope loudly,

subtitles.original: 呼吸よりも 生きた証
subtitles.english: the proof of living more than breathing.

subtitles.original: 唸れ徒花 朽ち果てても進め
subtitles.english: Roar, fruitless flowers; move forward even if you rot.

subtitles.original: 奪わせはしない 尊厳の愚弄に
subtitles.english: I won't let them take it, the mockery of dignity.

subtitles.original: 飢餓を解き放て
subtitles.english: Unleash the starvation.

subtitles.original: 枯れても走ることを命と呼べ
subtitles.english: Call the act of running even when withered 'life'.

subtitles.original: 空に叫ぶ 脱・生存の定義
subtitles.english: Shout to the sky, the definition of escape and survival.

subtitles.original: 骨を斬らせて 闇を断て
subtitles.english: Let your bones be cut, and sever the darkness.

subtitles.original: 雲間に光る 簒奪의 勝機
subtitles.english: The chance for usurpation shining through the clouds,

subtitles.original: 覚悟を 宿命に突きつけて
subtitles.english: push your resolve against fate.

subtitles.original: 荒野を駆ける 乱世に挑む
subtitles.english: Running through the wasteland, challenging the turbulent world.

subtitles.original: 天下に狂い咲く
subtitles.english: Blooming wildly under the heavens.

subtitles.original: SAGA SAGA
subtitles.english: SAGA, SAGA!
